Metadata.Coram: Sundaresh Menon CJ, Andrew Phang Boon Leong JA, Steven Chong JA
Metadata.Tribunal_Court: Court of Appeal of the Republic of Singapore

Party_Details.Name: Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd

Facts.Text: Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd was involved in the sale of OPL Vessels.
Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd purchased OPL Vessels from Parakou Shipping Pte Ltd.
Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd entered into a transaction to purchase OPL Vessels.
Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd communicated with Parakou Shipping Pte Ltd regarding the purchase of OPL Vessels.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether the sale of OPL Vessels to Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd was at an undervalue.
Party_Details.Rule: A transaction is at an undervalue if the consideration received is significantly less than the value of the asset.
Party_Details.Application: The Appellant argued that the sale price was within the valuation range and included a fleet discount. The Respondent claimed the sale was rushed and undervalued.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that the sale price was within the acceptable range after applying a fleet discount, and thus not at an undervalue.

Metadata.Coram: Sundaresh Menon CJ, Andrew Phang Boon Leong JA, Steven Chong JA
Metadata.Tribunal_Court: Court of Appeal of the Republic of Singapore

Party_Details.Name: Parakou Shipping Pte Ltd (in liquidation)

Facts.Text: Parakou Shipping Pte Ltd was incorporated with C C Liu and Chik Sau Kam as shareholders and directors.
Parakou Shipping Pte Ltd sold OPL Vessels to Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd.
Parakou Shipping Pte Ltd entered into a transaction to sell OPL Vessels.
Parakou Shipping Pte Ltd communicated with Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd regarding the sale of OPL Vessels.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether the sale of OPL Vessels to Parakou Investment Holdings Pte Ltd was at an undervalue.
Party_Details.Rule: A transaction is at an undervalue if the consideration received is significantly less than the value of the asset.
Party_Details.Application: The Respondent claimed the sale was rushed and undervalued, while the Appellant argued that the sale price was within the valuation range and included a fleet discount.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that the sale price was within the acceptable range after applying a fleet discount, and thus not at an undervalue.
